title: Update managed payload surfaces for doctor closure

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Update managed Agentic Workspace payload surfaces to the current payload version and make doctor report a fully clean state.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to managed payload surfaces, startup guidance, routing-feedback structure, and local scratch cleanup needed for doctor.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Use the payload upgrade output as source authority, adjust repo-owned startup/routing notes to satisfy current checks, and run the workspace proof lane.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A fix requires changing runtime behavior outside managed surfaces or broadening beyond doctor/payload closure.
canonical_core.next_action: Run required proof for the payload and doctor closure diff.
proof_expectations: Doctor reports healthy, compatible payload, zero warnings, and zero review findings.
Workspace lint and tests cover maintained surfaces after the payload refresh.
Diff review confirms README and managed AW surface changes match the requested closure.
touched_scope: .agentic-workspace managed payload docs, skills, manifests, provenance, planning review payload removals, routing feedback, planning ownership state, and README startup guidance
completion_criteria: Managed payload surfaces are updated to the expected payload release.
Doctor is fully clean with no warnings or needs-review findings.
The PR carries the payload closure diff with proof recorded.

goal: Update managed payload surfaces to the current expected release.
Satisfy doctor completely, including payload compatibility, warnings, and review findings.
non_goals: Leave adjacent backlog or follow-on work out of this plan.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: .agentic-workspace managed payload surfaces, README.md, tools/agent-manifest.json if maintained-surface rendering requires it, and verified untracked scratch nested repositories reported by doctor.

execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Ask before changing runtime package behavior or non-surface implementation code.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Unrelated backlog, package runtime logic, or user work outside the payload/doctor closure lane.
